title: Manipal Digital Health is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Manipal Digital Health is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Manipal Digital Health invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Manipal Digital Health:
Manipal Digital Health is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Digital Health!
